## OOM Triage

_Where the reachable heap is concentrated, at a glance._

- **Headline retainer:** `java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinWorkerThread` (a single object) retains 8.9 MB (46.3% of reachable heap).
- **Concentration:** Retention is spread across multiple roots.
- **Shape:** deep (retention flows through long dominator chains — often nested collections or linked structures) — 90% of objects within depth 9, max depth 28.
- **One leak or many:** the single biggest object retains 46.3% and the top 10 retain 89.9% of the heap; 7 object(s) each hold >=1%.
